strengths: Exceeds the 15-year minimum experience requirement with 18+ years in software, hardware, and infrastructure engineering across diverse tech stacks.
Demonstrates direct AI builder fluency through recent work developing AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflows.
Possesses strong entrepreneurial and leadership experience as a technical founder, coupled with a proven track record of inspiring others via conference talks, workshops, and internal mentoring.
concerns: Lacks the preferred Master's or PhD degree in an AI-related field.
Limited explicit evidence of operating at a Director-level capacity or directly advising strategic enterprise customers on cloud and AI adoption.
While experienced in applied AI tooling and agents, the resume does not highlight deep foundational Machine Learning expertise such as model training or fine-tuning.
response.justification: Bogdan presents a highly compelling case for advancement based on his 18+ years of comprehensive software and infrastructure engineering experience, which comfortably exceeds the role's minimum requirements. His recent hands-on work building AI-agent infrastructure proves his builder fluency in modern AI technologies, while his background as a founder (GISCollective) and technical speaker aligns perfectly with the requirement to inspire teams and drive disruptive innovation. Although he lacks an advanced AI degree and explicit Director-level strategic advisory experience, his profound technical versatility, entrepreneurial drive, and proven ability to deliver applied AI tools make him a uniquely capable candidate with significant upside for this strategic engineering role.
